description: Enhances support for StationPlaylist apps. In addition, adds global commands for the Studio application from everywhere.
changelog: * In Creator's playlist editor, resolved a regression from add-on version 26.01 where NVDA was sluggish when moving through date and hour combo boxes for multi-day playlists.
